name: Skewered Mozzarella with Canadian Bacon
recipeIngredient: 12 slices of French bread (long and narrow)
12 slices of raw tomato (1/2 inch each)
2 cans of tomato sauce (8 oz. each)
recipeInstructions:
Note: You'll need four skewers, approximately 10-12 inches long.
1. Preheat the oven to 400°F.
2. Cut the raw tomatoes and bread into halves.
3. Heat the salad oil in a large skillet over medium heat. Brown the bread slices on both sides, turning quickly to avoid burning. They should be lightly browned.
4. Cut each piece of mozzarella cheese into 1-inch squares about 1/4 inch thick.
5. Fold one slice of Canadian bacon around each piece of mozzarella, bread, and tomato. Press firmly to secure the ingredients in place.
6. Thread the assembled skewers with alternating pieces of bacon, mozzarella, bread, and tomato slices, starting and ending with the bacon.
7. Place each skewer upright in a shallow baking pan or earthenware dish, ensuring the folded top of the bacon is visible.
8. Pour tomato sauce over each skewer and sprinkle generously with grated parmesan cheese. Dust lightly with paprika and additional salad oil.
9. Bake at 400°F for about 10-15 minutes until the cheese browns on top. Serve immediately while hot.
